Short Description: Hot Honey Chicken and Mac and Cheese with Roasted Red Onions and Red Peppers
Long Description: Hot honey chicken paired with creamy mac and cheese and a hot honey drizzle, served with roasted red onions and red peppers for a bold, indulgent plate with a sweet heat finish.

Short Description: Chicken Tikka with a Mint Chutney and Saffron Roasted Cauliflower and Roasted Eggplant over Cardamom Basmati Rice
Long Description: Tender chicken tikka finished with a fresh mint chutney, served with saffron roasted cauliflower and roasted eggplant over cardamom basmati rice for a warm, aromatic plate with a bright, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Rosemary Garlic Steak with a Black Garlic Jus and Roasted Mushrooms and Pickled Red Onions over Toasted Brown Rice
Long Description: Rosemary garlic marinated steak finished with a rich black garlic jus, served with roasted mushrooms and pickled red onions over toasted brown rice for a savory, umami-forward plate with a refined, steakhouse-inspired finish.

Short Description: Lemon Caper Salmon with a Lemon Caper Dill Sauce and Roasted Broccoli and Roasted Rainbow Carrots over Wild Rice
Long Description: Pan seared salmon finished with a bright lemon caper dill sauce, served with roasted broccoli and roasted rainbow carrots over wild rice for a clean, Mediterranean-inspired plate with a fresh, citrus finish.

Short Description: Korean Seared Tofu with a Gochujang Sauce and Roasted Mushrooms and Roasted Broccoli over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Crispy seared extra firm tofu finished with a rich gochujang sauce, served with roasted mushrooms and roasted broccoli over jasmine rice for a bold, Korean-inspired plate with a sweet and savory finish.

Short Description: Our classic high protein and collagen-rich chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our classic chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours with fresh herbs and spices.

Short Description: Vanilla chia pudding with granola and fresh blueberries
Long Description: A creamy vanilla chia pudding sweetened with maple syrup and topped with Chef's granola and fresh organic blueberries.
